parameters.query:
SELECT memo_id, from_agent, to_agent, memo_type, subject, body_json,
       created_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW()-created_at))/3600 AS hours_open
FROM bridge.agent_memos
WHERE status = 'open'
  AND memo_type IN ('execution_directive','cto_review_request','build_validation_request')
  AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
  AND (body_json->>'self_heal_flagged') IS NULL
ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 10;

SELECT workflow_name, event_type, details_json, created_at,
       COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY workflow_name) AS failure_count
FROM bridge.workflow_events
WHERE event_type ILIKE '%error%' OR event_type ILIKE '%fail%'
  AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;

WITH mark_flagged AS (
  UPDATE bridge.agent_memos
  SET body_json = body_json || '{"self_heal_flagged": true}'::jsonb
  WHERE memo_id = ANY(
    SELECT (issue->>'memo_id')::uuid
    FROM jsonb_array_elements($1::jsonb) AS issue
    WHERE issue->>'memo_id' IS NOT NULL
  )
  RETURNING memo_id
),
alert_cos AS (
  INSERT INTO bridge.agent_memos
    (from_agent, to_agent, memo_type, priority, subject, body_json)
  VALUES (
    'self_healing', 'chief_of_staff', 'system_health_alert', 'high',
    $2,
    jsonb_build_object('issues', $1::jsonb, 'auto_generated', true,
                       'action_required', 'review_and_dispatch_fixes')
  ) RETURNING memo_id
),
log_heal AS (
  INSERT INTO bridge.workflow_events (workflow_name, event_type, details_json)
  VALUES ('self_healing', 'issues_detected',
    jsonb_build_object('summary', $2, 'issue_count', jsonb_array_length($1::jsonb)))
  RETURNING event_id
)
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mark_flagged) AS flagged,
       (SELECT memo_id FROM alert_cos) AS cos_alerted;

INSERT INTO bridge.agent_memos
  (from_agent, to_agent, memo_type, priority, subject, body_json)
SELECT 'self_healing', 'ceo', 'critical_system_alert', 'urgent',
       'CRITICAL: ' || $1,
       jsonb_build_object('critical_issues', $2::jsonb,
                          'requires_immediate_action', true)
WHERE $3::int > 0
RETURNING memo_id;
